lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: What? You haven't heard of me? The great Mia Persten of the Order of Wizards? The leading researcher in teleportation magic? The creator of the Home Teleport spell?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to offend you. I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: No offence taken! My research tends to take me far from the Wizards' Tower. I've been all across Gielinor and even to some other planes of existence!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Other planes of existence? Sounds exciting!

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Exciting and terrifying! Brilliant, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what are you doing in Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Should I not be in Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... good question. I guess I just haven't seen a wizard around here before.

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Well, maybe you should start expecting the unexpected! That way you can spend less time worrying about why I'm here, and more time asking life's real questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... and what kind of questions are you referring to?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Well, that's the thing. It's different for everyone! Why do trees grow from stumps substantially faster than from seeds? Where do meteorites come from? Why do we have to hold our arms out to teleport successfully?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. What are the answers?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: I don't know either!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're in Al Kharid to work out how trees grow?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: No, silly! I came here to buy something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Something?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: That's right! Something! Tell me, what do you know of runecrafting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not a lot really.

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: A shame. Unfortunately, this something requires some understanding in that area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a wizard doing in Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Why shouldn't a wizard be in Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... good question. I guess I just haven't seen a wizard around here before.

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Well for a start, I'm not just any wizard. The name's Mia Persten. I'm the leading researcher in teleportation magic for the Order of Wizards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Wizard Persten
lines.text: Now as for your question, maybe you should start expecting the unexpected! That way you can spend less time worrying about why I'm here, and more time asking life's real questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you around.
